MANY LARGE TREES DOWN ON THE SOUTHWEST SIDE OF HUBBARD LAKE. EF1 TORNADO WITH WINDS UP TO 100 MPH. TRACK LENGTH OF 3/4 OF A MILE AND WIDTH OF 200 YARDS. TRACK IS JUST TO THE WEST OF MOUNT MARIA ROAD, BETWEEN CONSOLIDATED ROAD AND WEST BRANCH RIVER.
